segments.text: Yeah, and there were points in time where the Game & Watch wasn't looking at its best,
but definitely being able to use the likes of Tsumupa as a stomping grounds to develop
this character fully has allowed him to be so prolific with this character.

full_text: Yeah, and there were points in time where the Game & Watch wasn't looking at its best, but definitely being able to use the likes of Tsumupa as a stomping grounds to develop this character fully has allowed him to be so prolific with this character.
